## Checklist

- [ ] `make build` and `make test` pass locally
- [ ] `swiftlint` is clean
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes (fixture-driven where parsing is involved)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) if user-facing
- [ ] `ContainerCore` remains UI-free; new public types are `Equatable` + `Sendable`
- [ ] New source files include the SPDX header
